strategy_options.name: expand_timeline_to_2025_full_universe
strategy_options.cons: requires paid historical odds provider with timestamped snapshots

strategy_options.name: shrink_eval_universe_to_timeline_supported_subset
strategy_options.pros: immediate CLV pipeline validation on supported games

strategy_options.name: hybrid_mode_debug_plus_production
strategy_options.target: separate debug universe and production universe
strategy_options.pros: unblocks asset QA now while preserving strict production gate
strategy_options.cons: does not solve scale until external 2025 timeline ingestion is connected

sandbox_validation.decision_label_behavior_verification: covered_by_unit_tests_only (rule-path valid, full label eval needs real outcomes + model predictions on same universe)
